pi_items.source: Verified via environment startup script (scripts/setup_sumo.sh), which creates and populates this directory with the Bologna Pasubio scenario files.
Verified via task setup script (setup_task.sh), which explicitly creates and clears this directory for user outputs.
Verified directly from the task.json instructions, which explicitly request a Reaction time (tau) of 1.8.
Verified directly from the task.json instructions, which explicitly request a Minimum gap (minGap) of 3.5.
Verified directly from the task.json instructions, which explicitly request a Driver imperfection (sigma) of 0.8.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Bologna Pasubio SUMO scenario located at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio, with user outputs directed to /home/ga/SUMO_Output. The agent is explicitly instructed to modify the Krauss car-following model parameters for passenger vehicles to: Reaction time (tau)=1.8, Minimum gap (minGap)=3.5, and Driver imperfection (sigma)=0.8. A successful baseline SUMO simulation of this scenario generates thousands of simulated trip records for comparison.
